hibernate-mapping.sql-query: INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreCharges( ROI_RequestCore_Seq , Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Release_Date, Release_Cost, Total_Pages, Total_Pages_Released, Salestax_Percentage, Billing_Type, Facility_Code, Facility_Name, Apply_SalesTax, Unbillable, DisplayBillingInfo) VALUES(:requestCoreSeq,:createdDt,:createdBy,:modifiedDt,:modifiedBy, :releaseDate,:releaseCost,:totalPages,:totalPagesReleased, :salesTaxPercentage,:billingType, :billingLocCode, :billingLocName, :applySalesTax, :unbillable, :displayBillingInfo); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();
UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreCharges SET DisplayBillingInfo = 0 WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreCharges SET DisplayBillingInfo = 1 WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreChargesDocument( ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq, Amount, Copies, BillingTierName, TotalPages, Pages, BillingTierId, ReleaseCount, isElectronic, RemoveBasecharge, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq,Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Has_Salestax, Salestax_Amount) VALUES(:requestCoreChargesSeq,:amount,:copies, :billingTierName,:totalPages,:pages,:billingtierId,:releaseCount,:isElectronic, :removeBaseCharge,:createdDt,:createdBy,:modifiedDt,:modifiedBy,:hasSalesTax, :salesTaxAmount); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreChargesFee( ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq , Amount, IsCustomFee, FeeType, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq,Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Has_Salestax, Salestax_Amount) VALUES(:requestCoreChargesSeq,:amount,:isCustomFee,:feeType,:createdDt,:createdBy,:modifiedDt,:modifiedBy, :hasSalesTax,:salesTaxAmount); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreChargesShipping( ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq , ShippingCharge, PostalCode, AddressType, State, ShippingUrl, Address1, Address2, ShippingWeight, TrackingNumber, Address3, City, WillReleaseShipped, ShippingMethod, OutputMethod, ShippingMethodId, Nonprintable_Attachment_Queue, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq,Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq , Country_Code, Country_Name) VALUES(:requestCoreChargesSeq,:shippingCharge,:postalCode,:addressType,:state,:shippingUrl,:address1, :address2,:shippingWeight,:trackingNumber,:address3,:city,:willReleaseShipped, :shippingMethod,:outputMethod,:shippingMethodId,:nonPrintableAttachmentQueue,:createdDt,:createdBy,:modifiedDt, :modifiedBy,:countryCode,:countryName); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

SELECT TOP 1 charges.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq id, charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestCoreSeq, charges.Created_Dt createdDt, charges.Created_By_Seq createdBy, charges.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, charges.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, charges.Record_Version recordVersion, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Base_Charge) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) previouslyReleasedCost, charges.Release_Date releaseDate, charges.Release_Cost releaseCost, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Base_Charge) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) + charges.Release_Cost totalRequestCost, charges.Total_Pages totalPages, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Balance_Due) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) + COALESCE(charges.Release_Cost, 0) balanceDue, charges.Total_Pages_Released totalPagesReleased,
(case when (charges.DisplayBillingInfo = 1) then (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Salestax) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(doc.Salestax_Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreChargesDocument doc WHERE doc.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_requestCoreCharges_Seq), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(fee.Salestax_Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreChargesFee fee WHERE fee.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = charges.ROI_requestCoreCharges_Seq), 0)) else COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Salestax) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) end) salesTaxAmount,
charges.Salestax_Percentage salesTaxPercentage, RTRIM(charges.Billing_Type) billingType, (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(invPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment invPay, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE inv.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0)) paymentAmount, (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(invAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment invAdj, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE inv.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0)) creditAdjustmentAmount, 0.00 debitAdjustmentAmount, RTRIM(charges.Facility_Code) billingLocCode, RTRIM(charges.Facility_Name) billingLocName, charges.Apply_SalesTax applySalesTax, charges.DisplayBillingInfo displayBillingPaymentInfo, charges.Unbillable unbillable, CAST((select COUNT(inv.ROI_RequestCoredeliveryCharges_seq) from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND inv.Type = 'Invoice') AS bit) hasInvoices,
COALESCE((select SUM(inv.Invoice_Balance_Due) from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) invoicesBalance,
COALESCE((select SUM(inv.Invoice_Salestax) from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0) invoicesSalesTaxAmount,
CAST((select COUNT(inv.ROI_RequestCoredeliveryCharges_seq) from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND inv.Is_Released = 0 AND inv.Type = 'Invoice') AS bit) hasUnReleasedInvoices,
COALESCE((select SUM(payment.UnappliedAmount) from ROI_RequestorPayment payment, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestorCoreRequestor where payment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestorCoreRequestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND requestorCoreRequestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND payment.IsDeleted = 0), 0) totalUnappliedPaymentAmount,
COALESCE((select SUM(adjustment.UnappliedAmount) from ROI_RequestorAdjustment adjustment, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestorCoreRequestor where adjustment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestorCoreRequestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND requestorCoreRequestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND adjustment.IsDeleted = 0), 0) totalUnappliedAdjustmentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT TOP 1 inv.Base_Charge FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice' order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc), 0) invoiceBaseCharge FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges charges WHERE charges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreSeq ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;

SELECT Amount amount, Copies copies, BillingTierName billingTierName, TotalPages totalPages, Pages pages, BillingTierId billingtierId, ReleaseCount releaseCount, isElectronic isElectronic , RemoveBasecharge removeBaseCharge, Has_Salestax hasSalesTax, SalesTax_Amount salesTaxAmount, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesDocument WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = :requestCoreChargesSeq ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;

SELECT Has_Salestax hasSalesTax, SalesTax_Amount salesTaxAmount, Amount amount, IsCustomFee isCustomFee, FeeType feeType, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesFee WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = :requestCoreChargesSeq ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;

SELECT TOP 1 ShippingCharge shippingCharge, PostalCode postalCode, AddressType addressType, State state, ShippingUrl shippingUrl, Address1 address1, Address2 address2, ShippingWeight shippingWeight, TrackingNumber trackingNumber, Address3 address3, City city, Country_Code countryCode, Country_Name countryName, WillReleaseShipped willReleaseShipped, ShippingMethod shippingMethod, OutputMethod outputMethod, ShippingMethodId shippingMethodId, Nonprintable_Attachment_Queue nonPrintableAttachmentQueue, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesShipping WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = :requestCoreChargesSeq ORDER BY Modified_Dt desc;
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesDocument WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = :requestCoreChargesSeq
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesFee WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = :requestCoreChargesSeq
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreSeq
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesShipping WHERE ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = :requestCoreChargesSeq

SELECT shipping.OutputMethod outputMethod FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges requestCoreCharges, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesShipping shipping WHERE requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = shipping.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq

DELETE shipping FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges requestCoreCharges, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesShipping shipping WHERE requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = shipping.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq

DELETE doc FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges requestCoreCharges, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesDocument doc WHERE requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = doc.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq

DELETE fee FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges requestCoreCharges, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesFee fee WHERE requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = fee.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq

DELETE sales FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreCharges requestCoreCharges, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreChargesSalesTaxReason sales WHERE requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and requestCoreCharges.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq = sales.ROI_RequestCoreCharges_Seq
UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreCharges SET Release_Cost = 0 WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreCharges SET Release_Cost = :releaseCost WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId

UPDATE ROI_RequestCoreCharges SET Release_Cost = :releaseCost, Modified_Dt = :modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBySeq
WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId
